name: Sentiment Analysis API — Public Endpoint
description: Production sentiment analysis public API with DYNAMIC ML service URL loaded from Firebase Firestore at every workflow execution (document ml_config/sentiment-ml-v1). No hardcoded URL — n8n Cloud Run workload identity calls the Firestore REST API directly. Changing the ML service URL in GCP no longer requires an n8n workflow deploy: just update the 'mlServiceUrl' field of the Firestore document via deploy.sh or the Console.
